message:
The other day, we found ourselves in a bit of a stormy mess. Rain was pouring, winds were howling, and I thought, "Oh no, here we go again!" So, I did what any sensible person would do—I opened up our family group chat. 

"Hey everyone, how’s the weather by you? Do we need to share our emergency plans again?" I asked, half-joking. To my surprise, it turned into a lively thread with everyone chiming in. My sister shared a photo of her cat looking decidedly unimpressed by the whole situation, and my brother sent a meme about the joys of being stuck indoors. 

Amidst the laughter, we settled on a solid plan for checking in on each other, sharing supplies, and making sure everyone had what they needed. It reminded me that a little preparation can go a long way, especially when you have a supportive family to lean on. 

How do you keep your family connected during stormy weather? This little refresher helped me get my thoughts organized!
